text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 一张图看懂：browser-harness、browser-use、Playwright 到底怎么选

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 核心判断：它们不是同一层的东西。先看你的目标，再选工具。

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 底座

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: Playwright

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 稳定自动化 / 测试 / CI

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 适合回归测试、E2E、可回放流程

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 强项是稳、可断言、可维护

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 不擅长开放式网页任务的临场判断

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 像什么

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 像一台稳定的自动化机械臂

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 整车

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: browser-use

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 开放式网页 Agent

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 适合多步网页任务、信息抽取、状态判断

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 自带 Agent loop、工具层、运行时能力

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 比 Playwright 更会做开放任务

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 像什么

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 像一个会自己规划步骤的网页员工

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 超薄运行层

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: browser-harness

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 接管真实浏览器协作

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 适合已登录 Chrome、个人生产力、实时接管

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 优点是薄、灵活、离真实浏览器更近

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 代价是可复现性和标准化更弱

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 像什么

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 像让 AI 直接接手你当前浏览器的遥控层

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 选型口诀：

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 要稳，用 Playwright

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 要会自己做任务，用 browser-use

text.font-family: Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 要接管真实浏览器，用 browser-harness
